name: Fruity Pound Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 teaspoon grated lemon or orange peel
1 package (2 layer size) white cake mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Add gelatin and grated peel to the cake mix.
2. Prepare and bake the cake mix as directed on the package in two 8 or 9 inch round cake pans.
3. Cool for 15 minutes, then remove from the pans.
4. Cool for another 15 minutes, then remove from the pans again.
5. Allow the cakes to cool completely on wire racks.
6. Fill and frost with Fluffy Pudding Frosting.
7. Decorate as directed. Makes 12 servings.
Fluffy Pudding Frosting:
1. Pour 1 cup cold milk into a medium bowl.
2. Add 1 package (4 serving size) Jello Instant Pudding & Pie Filling, any flavor, and 1/4 cup powdered sugar to the milk.
3. Beat with a wire whisk for 2 minutes.
4. Gently stir in 1 tub (8 ounces) whipped topping, thawed.
5. Spread onto the cake immediately. Makes about 4 cups or enough for two 8 or 9 inch layers.
